productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Applique Work Purple T-shirt
description: Composition Lavender V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and appliqué work on the left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this lavender t-shirt from united colors of benetton. The appliqué of roses on the left chest defines your feminine side with much elan. Team this with jeans or skirts and sandals available in a wide collection at myntra for a chic look.
